description_long: This is a classic red fire extinguisher with a cylindrical metal body and a black hose attached to its side. The top features a black handle and a lever, along with a visible pressure gauge and a safety pin. The front of the extinguisher displays a large white instruction label with text and pictograms, while the back has a maintenance record label. The black hose is secured to the body with a strap and ends in a nozzle, designed for directing the extinguishing agent. The extinguisher's surface is smooth and glossy, with metallic and plastic components visible at the top and hose.
description: A red cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black hose, handle, pressure gauge, and detailed instruction and maintenance labels.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the black hose running vertically and a maintenance record label on the back.
description_view_1: Front-left view highlighting the instruction label, pressure gauge, handle, and the hose's attachment point.
description_view_2: Back-right view focusing on the top handle, safety pin, and the side of the extinguisher with minimal label visibility.
description_view_3: Left-side view showing the maintenance record label, handle, lever, and the hose curving down the side.
attribute_label_or_signage: Large white instruction label with text and pictograms on the front, and a maintenance record label on the back.
attribute_mounting_bracket_or_holder: A black strap secures the hose to the body, but no wall bracket or holder is visible.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black hose is attached to the side, approximately the height of the extinguisher, ending in a nozzle and secured with a strap.
attribute_pressure_gauge: A round pressure gauge is present at the top near the handle, with colored markings visible.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A metallic safety pin is visible at the top near the handle, secured in place.
